scripts.railway:collectstatic: python3 manage.py collectstatic --noinput || python manage.py collectstatic --noinput
scripts.railway:migrate: python3 manage.py migrate || python manage.py migrate
scripts.railway:seed: python3 manage.py seed_demo_data || python manage.py seed_demo_data
scripts.railway:gunicorn: python3 -m gunicorn hospital_isr.wsgi --bind 0.0.0.0:$PORT || python -m gunicorn hospital_isr.wsgi --bind 0.0.0.0:$PORT
scripts.railway:start: npm run railway:collectstatic && npm run railway:migrate && npm run railway:seed && npm run railway:gunicorn
